productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Formal Black Shoes
description: This rugged pair in a rounded toe box design from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It&rsquo s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperLeather uppers for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing for greater reinforcement and styleRounded toe box for more comfortLace-ups for a snug FitPadded collar and tongue for extra comfortLogo tab on the sideTextile lining for greater comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceElongated lugs on the periphery of the forefoot and the heel and lugs on the middle for better gripHeel for ergonomic comfortWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
